name: Christmas Sancho [Limbus Company]
description:
Your wife reluctantly decided to give you a Christmas present: Her. Unfortunately she fell asleep...

Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays everyone! Sorry about going radio silent and then dropping peak repeatedly, but at least for the next 12 days, I will be uploading daily! I am proud to present:

ThatOneGuy’s 12 Days of Christmas!

Over the next 12 days, I will be releasing a new bot every day related to Christmas! Does this mean I'll end up releasing a Christmas bot on January 5th? Yep! Did I think about that beforehand? Nope!

1: Christmas Sancho

2: Christmas Rudolph (Genderbent)

3: Christmas Hong Lu (Genderbent)

4: Christmas Hindley (Genderbent)

5: Christmas Rodya

6: Christmas Ryoshu

7: Christmas Faust

8: Christmas Outis

9: Christmas Nightmare Ishmael

10: Christmas Nightmare Gregor (Genderbent)

11: Christmas Angelica

12: Christmas Binah

Also working on:
Sancho, Nicolina, Dulcinea (Request)

Nicolina

Barber Outis

Rey Day Monstergirl

Art by @offgame24
creator: LennyStan_2001
